visa_types.name: Business
visa_types.documents_required:
For all types of visa applications, the following are the basic documents are required:
- Document Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/GoolTYRc09eHLqhwiitOm/58eac6d564fa0a89e056b10b0140cbfc/Business-Checklist-Feb-2026.pdf)
- Application Form (14A (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/28Ud7L8thHmZ5bKAe5G6F2/b56effc3c6ec0a78bc0fe0342848f8bb/Form-14a-Updated-10-Feb-2026.pdf)) duly completed and signed by the applicant (Form 14A is also downloadable from: www.ica.gov.sg (https://www.ica.gov.sg/)
- Applications without a Letter of Invitation (V39A (https://www.ica.gov.sg/docs/default-source/ica/forms/formv39a.pdf)) without a mentioned of NRIC number will not be accepted.
- Saudi Diplomatic passport will not require a visa to enter Singapore.
- Applicants can request a representative to submit their visa application and all necessary documents on their behalf however the representative must submit an authorisation letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7BYDD5kNtc39jR9VhP4xMX/76845a337ea50458b513517d5c044bbd/Authorization-Letter.pdf), without which the application will not be accepted
- Collection of Visa: If your application is approved, the authorised visa agent share the notification by email to review the visa document or please contact our call centre for more information.
visa_types.processing_time: The processing time for a visa  application is approximately 5 working days excluding the day of submission and  the Saudi Arabia & Singapore week-ends holidays. However, some applications  may take longer if further verification and evaluation are required.
visa_types.forms:
Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/28Ud7L8thHmZ5bKAe5G6F2/b56effc3c6ec0a78bc0fe0342848f8bb/Form-14a-Updated-10-Feb-2026.pdf)
LOI-Form (V39A) (https://www.ica.gov.sg/docs/default-source/ica/forms/formv39a.pdf)
Dear Applicants,
If you are sending your application by a representative please fill the “Authorization Form” as VFS officer will not accept any
         visa application without Authorization Form along with his/her ID card copy.
Authorization Letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7BYDD5kNtc39jR9VhP4xMX/76845a337ea50458b513517d5c044bbd/Authorization-Letter.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Find out whether, depending on your citizenship, country of long-term residence, and the duration and reasons for your stay, you need a visa to enter Singapore
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Find out whether, depending on your citizenship, country of long-term residence, and the duration and reasons for your stay, you need a visa to enter Singapore 

## Visa Fees

## Application Fee
The visa application fee must be paid in cash only. The visa application fee for each application is SAR 85.00. 

[Table:Business]

## Please note:
- The applicable visa fee in SAR 85 is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- The visa fee is non-refundable.

## Service Charges
Applicants shall be levied a service charge of SAR 166.47 (inclusive of tax) per application. This fee is payable in cash only

## Additional services
The fees listed here are in addition to the visa application fee and the service charges. The services can be purchased at the visa application. These services are supplied by VFS. 

## Processing Time
The processing time for a visa application is approximately 5 working days excluding the day of submission and the Saudi Arabia & Singapore week-ends holidays. However, some applications may take longer if further verification and evaluation are required.

## Documents Required
For all types of visa applications, the following are the basic documents are required:
- Document Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/GoolTYRc09eHLqhwiitOm/58eac6d564fa0a89e056b10b0140cbfc/Business-Checklist-Feb-2026.pdf)
- Application Form (14A (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/28Ud7L8thHmZ5bKAe5G6F2/b56effc3c6ec0a78bc0fe0342848f8bb/Form-14a-Updated-10-Feb-2026.pdf)) duly completed and signed by the applicant (Form 14A is also downloadable from: www.ica.gov.sg (https://www.ica.gov.sg/)
- Applications without a Letter of Invitation (V39A (https://www.ica.gov.sg/docs/default-source/ica/forms/formv39a.pdf)) without a mentioned of NRIC number will not be accepted.
- Saudi Diplomatic passport will not require a visa to enter Singapore.
- Applicants can request a representative to submit their visa application and all necessary documents on their behalf however the representative must submit an authorisation letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7BYDD5kNtc39jR9VhP4xMX/76845a337ea50458b513517d5c044bbd/Authorization-Letter.pdf), without which the application will not be accepted
- Collection of Visa: If your application is approved, the authorised visa agent share the notification by email to review the visa document or please contact our call centre for more information.

## Photo Specifications
- The  photograph must be in color.
- It  should be without border.
- It  should have a light colored background only so that features are  distinguishable and in contrast against the background.
- It  should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face  takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It  should be in sharp focus and clear.
- It  should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The  photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It  should be 4.5 cm X 3.5 cm.
- It  should show your skin tone naturally.
- It  should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The  photograph should be a recent one not more than 3 months old.
- Photograph  can be taken with headgear, the main characteristics of the face must be  apparent from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes and eyebrows must not be  covered; the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of the  face is apparent.
- It  should be without hat/cap.
- It  should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The  photograph must show facing square on to the camera, not looking over the shoulder  or tilted, and showing both edges of the face clearly.
- It  should be taken with uniform lighting and not show shadows or flash reflections  on the face and no red eye
- If  wearing glasses the photograph must show the eyes clearly with no flash reflection  off the glasses and no tinted lenses (if possible, avoid heavy frames – lighter  framed glasses to be worn). Make sure the frame does not cover any part of the  eye.
- The  photograph must show alone (no chair backs, toys or other people visible) looking  at the camera with a neutral expression and the mouth closed.
- The  photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned  & color photocopies would NOT be accepted.

## Processing Time
The processing time for a visa  application is approximately 5 working days excluding the day of submission and  the Saudi Arabia & Singapore week-ends holidays. However, some applications  may take longer if further verification and evaluation are required.

## Download Forms
Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/28Ud7L8thHmZ5bKAe5G6F2/b56effc3c6ec0a78bc0fe0342848f8bb/Form-14a-Updated-10-Feb-2026.pdf)
LOI-Form (V39A) (https://www.ica.gov.sg/docs/default-source/ica/forms/formv39a.pdf)
Dear Applicants,
If you are sending your application by a representative please fill the “Authorization Form” as VFS officer will not accept any
         visa application without Authorization Form along with his/her ID card copy.
Authorization Letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7BYDD5kNtc39jR9VhP4xMX/76845a337ea50458b513517d5c044bbd/Authorization-Letter.pdf)
